import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "ticker": string;
  "name": string;
  "sector": string;
  "price": number;
  "change": number;
  "volume": number;
  "marketCap": number;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Financial Performance",
  "description": "Pinned ID column, sticky actions on the right, grouped numeric headers.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "compact",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": false,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": false,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": true,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "enableNestedHeaders": true,
  "enablePinnedColumns": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "ticker",
      "label": "Ticker",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "pinned": "start",
      "width": 100,
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Buy": "default",
        "Hold": "secondary",
        "Sell": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "name",
      "label": "Company",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 220
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "sector",
      "label": "Sector",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Tech": "default",
        "Finance": "secondary",
        "Energy": "outline",
        "Health": "default"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "price",
      "label": "Price",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "group": "Performance",
      "aggregation": "avg",
      "footerLabel": "Avg"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "change",
      "label": "Δ %",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "group": "Performance"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "volume",
      "label": "Volume",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "group": "Performance",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "marketCap",
      "label": "Market Cap",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "group": "Performance",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "pinned": "end",
      "width": 60
    }
  ],
  "columnGroups": [
    {
      "id": "g1",
      "label": "Identity",
      "columns": [
        "c1",
        "c2",
        "c3"
      ],
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "g2",
      "label": "Performance (USD)",
      "columns": [
        "c4",
        "c5",
        "c6",
        "c7"
      ],
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
